## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all -- --check`
- [ ] `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings`
- [ ] `cargo test --workspace`
- [ ] Docs updated if user-visible
- [ ] New dependencies listed in `DEPENDENCIES.md`
- [ ] No generated binaries or secrets committed
